summary: Verified framework RAG pipeline claims from the requested LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Haystack sources and distilled 6 source-backed design implications for DinoBrain. No repository files were edited by the agent; only DinoBrain task/context/event records were created by protocol.
decisions: Treat framework RAG pipelines as explicit staged systems: indexing/ingestion separated from query-time retrieval/generation.
DinoBrain design implications should emphasize provenance, modular retriever/storage adapters, retrieval policy tradeoffs, prompt-injection boundaries, and local-first persistence/scaling.
next_steps: Use these verified claims as source anchors for DinoBrain RAG design notes or accepted source records if the user asks for a file update.
